title: arnica parryi subsp. sonnei
intro: Arnica parryi subsp. sonnei is a subspecies of the Arnica parryi plant, a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-rheumatic effects. The health benefits of Arnica parryi subsp. sonnei include reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include topical creams, ointments, and tinctures, as well as homeopathic remedies, which can be applied directly to the affected area to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
